title: Analyze SimpleBondV4 storage surface
description: Inspect the SimpleBondV4 state-variable block and determine the current top-level storage ordering that the comments need to document.

title: Add storage layout comments to SimpleBondV4
description: Update contracts/SimpleBondV4.sol to add concise comments around the existing state-variable declarations that document the current storage layout without changing behavior, names, or ordering.

title: Verify the change stays comment-only
description: Review the diff and, if dependencies are available, compile the contracts to confirm the storage layout documentation introduces no functional or ABI changes.
